dict.string: WarbFit connects directly to your fitness tracker strap over Bluetooth to read heart rate, R-R intervals, battery, and sensor data locally on your iPhone. Nothing leaves your device.
WarbFit reads Apple Health sleep analysis on-device to calculate a sleep score. Recovery, strain, activity, workouts, HRV, and resting heart rate come from your fitness tracker strap.
WarbFit can export fitness tracker heart rate, HRV, detected sleep stages, workouts, and active energy to Apple Health when you explicitly request it.
WarbFit uses your location during outdoor runs and hikes to record your route, distance, and pace.
WarbFit uses iPhone motion step counts only when fitness tracker step data is not available, so the Today steps card is not based on a weak motion estimate.
